problem id: 4ec611d7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00010111 -> 01110100
  10101100 -> 11100001
  01111111 -> 11101000
  10011010 -> 10001111
  00110011 -> 00111111
  11111011 -> 10000001
  10010101 -> 01111100
  01011100 -> 11010010

query: 01100000
predicted answer: 00011110
